query:
-- Direct head expenses
SELECT 'direct_expense' AS type, SUM(amount) AS total
FROM expenses WHERE headId = 90006 AND targetType = 'head'

UNION ALL

-- Category expenses allocated to FAT0003's category (id=7) during its time on farm
SELECT 'category_expense_raw', SUM(amount)
FROM expenses WHERE categoryTarget = 7 AND targetType = 'category'
  AND expenseDate >= '2026-01-10'

UNION ALL

-- Herd-wide expenses during FAT0003's time on farm
SELECT 'herd_expense_raw', SUM(amount)
FROM expenses WHERE targetType = 'herd'
  AND expenseDate >= '2026-01-10'

UNION ALL

-- Ration plan for category 7
SELECT 'ration_plan_check', COUNT(*)
FROM ration_plans WHERE categoryId = 7 AND isActive = 1;
